jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Upstox
jsonLd.description:
Upstox is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
